results.justification: TURN explicitly optimizes temperature for multi-sample inference aggregation — direct functional twin for parameter-space coverage component.
DBS group beam dissimilarity is functionally equivalent to phase-offset coverage for diverse decoding.
Arithmetic Sampling generates parallel diverse samples via deterministic spacing — analogous to golden-angle spacing.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Judge Decoding small judge over samples
results.justification: Judge Decoding integrates small judge module over multi-sample verification — covers judge-selection component.
Comprehensive decoding-method survey covers BOWL-PARTIAL design space.
Multi-objective HPO covers parameter-space coverage strategy.
Self-regulating HPO covers adaptive decoder strategy selection.
Low-discrepancy sampling (Sobol, Halton) for HPO is functionally equivalent to golden-angle coverage of strategy space.
